.footnotes::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-preview-view hr::after.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.markdown-preview-view hr::after.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.nav-file-title-content::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-folder-title-content::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(130, 114, 208), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(130, 114, 208), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h3[data-heading=\"This is a heading 3\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(130, 114, 208), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h4[data-heading=\"This is a heading 4\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(130, 114, 208), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h5[data-heading=\"This is a heading 5\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(130, 114, 208), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.background: rgb(8, 109, 221) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
